code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = tokens.len()
mut i = 0
mut out = ""
mut current_max = 0
while i < n
  let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
  match tok_opt
  when Some(tok)
    let parsed = string.parse_int(tok)
    match parsed
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        current_max = v
      else if v > current_max
        current_max = v
      end
      if i == 0
        out = "#{current_max}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{current_max}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
